title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nike India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nike India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nike India Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Nike India Holdings Services:
Nike India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nike India Holdings Services!
